title: Zakira.Conduit manifest
description: Manifest describing skill sources to mirror into one or more local target directories.

name.description: Unique entry identifier. Used as the destination sub-directory name when the source produces exactly one content unit; used only for filtering / logs when the source produces multiple units.

as.description: Renames the destination sub-directory for this entry/path.

repo.description: Repository identifier. Accepts a slug (owner/repo), a github.com URL, or an SSH-style reference (git@github.com:owner/repo[.git]).

path.description: Optional single sub-path. Mutually exclusive with 'paths'.

paths.description: Optional list of sub-paths. Mutually exclusive with 'path'. With one element the destination subdirectory uses the entry name; with two or more, each sub-path mirrors to its basename (or 'as' alias) and the entry name is metadata only.

branch.description: Branch (or tag) name. May coexist with 'commit': in that case 'branch' is the tracking intent and 'commit' is the locked-in snapshot. `conduit pin` and `conduit update` rewrite 'commit' to the latest SHA on this branch.

commit.description: Commit SHA. When both 'branch' and 'commit' are present, 'commit' wins for fetching; 'branch' is retained as the refresh intent.

path.description: Single source directory. Mutually exclusive with 'paths'.

paths.description: Multiple source directories. Mutually exclusive with 'path'.
